title: hylotelephium telephium subsp. zhiguliense
intro: Hylotelephium telephium subsp. zhiguliense, also known as the Hylotelephium telephium Zhiguliense or Russian Stonecrop, is a subspecies of succulent plant that belongs to the Crassulaceae family. This plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Hylotelephium telephium subsp. zhiguliense include its ability to aid in wound healing, reduce inflammation, and exhibit antioxidant properties. Hylotelephium telephium subsp. zhiguliense is often prepared in herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health issues, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness.
